---
title: "Research"
description: ""
listing:
  - id: working-papers
    include:
      type: "Working"
    contents: research.yaml
    template: research.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
  - id: in-progress
    include:
      type: "Progress"
    contents: research.yaml
    template: research.ejs
    filter-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
  - id: published-papers
    include:
      type: "Published"
    contents: research.yaml
    template: research.ejs
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
  - id: books
    include:
      type: "Books"
    contents: research.yaml
    template: research.ejs
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

:::{#published-papers}
:::

## Working Papers

:::{#working-papers}
:::

## Works in Progress

:::{#in-progress}
:::

## Book Chapters

:::{#books}
:::
